title: physalis greenei
intro: Physalis greenei, also known as the Green's ground cherry, is a type of fruit-bearing plant belonging to the nightshade family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Physalis greenei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tinctures, teas, and jams, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
